name: Grilled Curry-Apricot Shrimp and Scallops
recipeIngredient: 16 large Shrimp (peeled, deveined, tails left intact)
4 Bamboo skewers (soaked in water for 30 minutes)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine olive oil, apricot preserves, Dijon mustard, curry powder, garlic, cilantro, and jalapeno chili.
2. Add shrimp and scallops to the bowl; toss to coat evenly.
3. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes up to 1 hour, tossing occasionally.
4. Prepare the barbecue.
5. Skewer 4 shrimp and 3 scallops alternately on each skewer.
6. Grill until shrimp are cooked through and scallops are opaque, brushing frequently with marinade, about 3 minutes per side.
7. Bring remaining marinade to a simmer in a small saucepan.
8. Serve grilled shrimp and scallops on the skewers, passing the marinade separately.
